basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Rishikesh (AIIMS Rishikesh)
basic_details.post_name: Data Entry Operator and Project Coordinator
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years for all posts. Age relaxation rules will be as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: 12th Passed in science/other stream with computer subject from a recognized board With 1year of AIIMS Rishikesh experience in relevant subject, Master degree in science subjects from a recognized university. With 1year of AIIMS Rishikesh experience in relevant subject
qualification.details: Data Entry Operator: 12th Passed in science/other stream with computer subject from a recognized board with 1 year of AIIMS Rishikesh experience in the relevant subject. Project Coordinator: Master degree in science subjects from a recognized university with 1 year of AIIMS Rishikesh experience in the relevant subject.

selection_process: Written exam / Interview or both Online Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Rishikesh Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Rishikesh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the AIIMS Rishikesh Recruitment 2026 is 30th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Data Entry Operator and Project Coordinator posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies, with 2 for Data Entry Operator and 1 for Project Coordinator.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Data Entry Operator post?
faq.answer: For the Data Entry Operator post, candidates must have passed 12th grade in a science or other stream with a computer subject and possess 1 year of relevant experience at AIIMS Rishikesh.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification for the Project Coordinator post?
faq.answer: The Project Coordinator position requires a Master's degree in science subjects from a recognized university, along with 1 year of relevant experience at AIIMS Rishikesh.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the advertised posts is 40 years.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for AIIMS Rishikesh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Data Entry Operator and Project Coordinator posts?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 20,000 to Rs. 40,000 per month, with Data Entry Operators receiving Rs. 20,000 and Project Coordinators receiving Rs. 40,000.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process may involve a written exam, an interview, or both, with the final interview being conducted online.

faq.question: Q9. How should candidates apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates need to apply by sending their complete application along with required documents via email before the last date.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for AIIMS Rishikesh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section provided in this article.
